title.en: Non-volatile electrically erasable programmable read-only memory media sanitisation

group-parts.group: Non-volatile electrically erasable programmable read-only memory media sanitisation
group-parts.name: overview

prose.en: A single overwrite with a random pattern, followed by a read back for verification, is considered suitable for sanitising non-volatile electrically erasable programmable read-only memory (EEPROM) media.
